signupData.goalsElaboration: Lose weight and have more energy for kids. Single parent, very busy.
signupData.injuries: Postpartum core issues, needs some core modifications. Very limited and unpredictable schedule.

onboardingMessages: I'm a single mom and I just want to lose some weight and have more energy to keep up with my kids
I have kettlebells and bands in my garage. That's about it.
I can maybe do 20-30 minutes when I get a chance, 3 times a week if I'm lucky
